Full_Review: The only problem I faced was a concierge attendant who was a little bit unfriendly with me as far as I have asked to organize a transfer for me and he behaved as it was not really his business I don t remember his name however he served on Saturday 19 11 2016 in the evening Additionally during my first day of staying at the hotel I have found somebody s hair in my bathroom right after checking in the room Anyway these factors didn t spoil my stay at all   Hotel s staff was very friendly indeed Breakfasts are amazing with the freshest bakery and croissants Fell in love with them If I visit Paris once again I will definitely stay at this hotel avoiding choosing other options

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The breakfast could be a bit more exiting and the information regarding the additional items on the menu from the kitchen more clear There is a obvious need for renovation but everything is clean and funcutional   The service was impeccable and the location perfect

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The room was fine but the shower in particular was not easily accessible   We enjoyed the location more than anything Close to the Louvre Museum the Metro Station restaurants etc Personnel were very amicable and helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: There was nothing we didn t like Absolutely without fault   We checked into the Hyatt Hotel du Louvre after our wedding It s a fantastic location the staff were very helpful friendly and professional We were given a bottle of wine a cheese selection and macaroons on arrival even though we arrived late at 11pm Full breakfast was included and it was very good with a wide selection of food and drinks The room was spacious with a sitting lounge room large and very comfortable bedroom and large bathroom The view from the balcony doors was also a notable feature

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The hotel is a bit aged and rooms are a little dark TV is small and the facilities are a bit poor   The location is perfect Located just a minute walk from The Lourve and 5 minutes away from Beautiful Les Halles and Luxury Rue Saint Honore This place is convenient and perfect for any busy traveller

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The hotel staff were genuinely courteous and gracious Our room was beautiful and the concierge gave excellent advice Will return without a doubt

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Hotel looks old and outdated with worn carpets dark halls and old furniture in room Price is very high for such an old venue   Very good staff location is great service

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: A big negative was the lack of coffee making facilities in rooms Not even a room we could access other than the breakfast room   For Paris the room was a reasonable size and price The night consierrge was extremely helpful and resolved a small problem very promptly We primarily chose this hotel because of its location and it delivered in spades

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: some rooms may be due for maintenance upgrade   The helpful and friendly staff the superb central location within walking distance of the major attractions and the spacious room size

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Being there for seven nights and have our breakfast at the hotel the variety of the food was limited but the personal was very attentive   Extra thanks to Florence Ramon who helped us in every aspect plus from the second day upgraded us to a nice room with view

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: WiFi signal too weak shame for 5 hotel Luckily from our suit on 5th floor we could get WIFI signal from nearest Cafe  Good Location and professional staff

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The meals and the beverages in the restaurant and bar were very high I thought 21 Euros was extremely high for one drink   The people who worked there were all extremely friendly and helpful They were great

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: It s great although I was told that it ll go through stage by stage of renovations in the coming months which could be a concern   It s location is amazing Right in the mid of all the excitement although very touristy A very handy metro station within 30 seconds walk and plenty of great cafe s nearby Claus 5 min walk Staff are very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The polyester pillows suck Down pillows make all the difference for a comfortable sleep This beautiful old building needs some basic upkeep and attention   We had a llarge corner room that looked out over the Louvre This location on the Right Bank can t be beat You are within minutes to all the wonderful sights and restaurants

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: With this price I expect a bigger space of room  Perfect location 1 minute walk into Musee de Louvre and within 15 minutes walk to Musee d Orsay Very good shopping possibility Very historical facilities and style and very considerate service

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The ridiculous cost of the minibar and drinks in the bar You would sell a lot more if you priced these things at a reasonable price   The Fragonard soaps ect are a very nice touch Plenty of English channels on the tv

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: We got a really good deal for this hotel and when we arrived our room was upgraded from a standard room to a balcony room so it was excellent The hotel is old but the room is nice and comfortable We stayed for 4 nights The concierge is very helpful The location is VERY close to Louvre museum and the metro station This makes it even more convenient

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: A little problem is the suburban running under the Hotel ground If you are sensitive you feel it You should than book upper Floor   Nice and big room Excellent feel well in historic place

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Has only one elevator that gets congested all the time room furniture is a bit dated absolutely zero available plugs to use for charging your stuff need to unplug lights   Good location close proximity to all tourist attractions safe neighborhood clothes hanger heater in the bathroom nice cafe downstairs

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Shower It was either too cold or too hot There where stains on the walls in the bathroom and it was all kind of run down We stayed in the family room which was also expensive   Location

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: There was one staff member who yelled at us for taking the side door with our stroller We didn t know it was kind of not okay because a staff member had previously shown it to us to facilitate our moving around Anyway she scowled at us and did not soften her displeasure with us   The bed was definitely like a cloud The cleaning service came in twice a day which was lovely The location also just could not be beat as it was right next to the Louvre near a grocery store and several cafes and cute dining areas

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: toilets are separate from the bathroom and in another location in the room which is not very hygienic my room is on the fifth floor and which meant it was very old style dark red furniture which made it very dark  The location is great The staff are very friendly

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The room size was quite small one room booked as with the view actually didn t have it Generally the hotel not quite linked by overall service level with Hyatt chain in other ones we stayed around the world service was higher Last but not the least one required interior renovation especially rooms doors extremely noise all the day from closing opening ones   Location of the hotel is really nice near by to all most important areas in Paris clean and tidy rooms

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The place is falling apart and I found that this hotel is a long way from 5 star I was really very disappointed The air conditioning was on all night my bath ran away and the plug plunger came off in my hand of the sink   The building and the location

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Nothing we had a great trip  We were greeted by Celine and Tamara at check in who upgraded us to a Suite when they found our we were celebrating our 33rd Wedding anniversary Room comfort was exceptional Hotel location excellent Staff were professional and friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: No  Staff is very nice we are going during my wife birthday and they have surprise cake and fruit juice in our room Also location is very good just only 1 min from hotel to metro

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The hotel is in a fabulous location but is badly in need of a renovation We would have given its current state a 3 5 4 star rating Having said that we would stay there again at a reduced rate just not with the higher expectations that we had had from their room pricing rating and photos  The staff were helpful and friendly and went out of their way to ensure we enjoyed our stay there Because of them we did thank you all

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Very helpful friendly staff Location great I m very fussy when it comes to cleanliness You didn t let me down My room was lovely and bed linen etc immaculate I will stay here again when in Paris

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: See above   The concierge desk added costs without informing me Ordering a cab for departure and telling me that I would be charged 7 Doris for their call eas not honest Charging an additional 5 euros for a ticket to the Louvre was not unacceptable but should have been divulged The front desk was much more obliging and helpful Paris needs American tourists and should be welcoming helpful and generous to those of us who are visiting despite the precarious conditions in France

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Staff were fantastic really helpful and always available I travelled here with my wife to celebrate her 40th birthday I had contacted the hotel beforehand about this and they couldn t have been any more accommodating with all of my requests From a room upgrade to a birthday cake and a bottle of wine on her birthday they made the stay an excellent one

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: There was no shower curtain in the bathroom Not sure if that s a European thing but every time we took a shower the floor was soaking wet   Great location we had a huge room with a walk in closet and a little sitting area and king size bed Staff were very friendly

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: This hotel is due for a makeover I was told that this will happen starting in September It is in desperate need of this as the furniture doors and walls are scratched worn and broken It was comfortable but ready for a redo   Our room was large but I had to upgrade the girls to a larger room The staff is amazing All were very friendly spoke excellent English and were extremely helpful with everything The location is fantastic

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Our room was on the top floor rather small but cozy Nothing we didn t like   Staff were terrific and location can t be beat Walking distance or Metro from most everywhere Can t be better to look out the window and almost touch the Louvre Also hotel restaurant was recommended by concierges at other hotels

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: High priced even for Paris D cor in the rooms was outdated and did not seem correct to the period it was set in TV cuts itself on and off This was both tvs And it also did the same thing in our kid s rooms A C fan would also cut itself off and on in both ours and kids rooms   Location Bathrooms were modern and beautiful and clean Very helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Great location Friendly staff Lovely bar area Car valet service was particularly pro active The bed was comfortable and then room was very large with lounge facilities However we were kept waiting for our room and not called when it was ready The room did not smell fresh and felt stripped down to the minimum No coffee facilities Payment needed to watch tv or use the internet other than wifi Probably more a 4 star hotel than 5

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Some minor renovation to correct a few shortcomings But just a few Leave the old atmosphere   Location location Nice old hotel with great atmosphere

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: the little lounge at the top of the first set of stairs was seldom open   The view from the bedroom the locality and the friendliness of the staff Phillppe who welcomed us in and looked after us was particularly helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: It was quite cold in the room even with a conditioner   Very comfortable location Just in the centre Easy to go on foot to popular restaurants and places of interest

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: the room was small and most importantly had only one usable outlet these days people need to charge their phone camera ipad etc i found it very inconvenient to have only one outlet i know that they have plans to remodel hope the new facilities will match the great location  great location booked a room with a view could see inside the Louvre from my window and the staff was very helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: I found the outside of the hotel beautiful very old world building the interior left a lot to be desired in my opinion especially for what is to be a 5 star hotel Fell very far below the equally priced hotel I stayed at week prior in London which was also 5 star and centrally located   Location was great directly across from the Louvre and central to most everything either on foot or the subway which is also right there

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The room was spotless The bathroom taps were polished and the remote control was the cleanest I ve ever seen Comfy bed spacious room Pity I was there for only one night

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Not impressed by breakfast   Comfortable rooms great service from the front desk and the concierge people Perfect location close to metro stop shopping sightseeing theaters and museums

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: There is a smell in the public areas that you would associate with old furniture   Great location Just opposite the Louvre and in the middle of cafes and restaurants Nice building and comfortable rooms

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Smelled the mold in the room maybe because of the huminity Paris got too much rain this year   The hotel staff are very nice and helpful The location is great

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: I was delighted with the suite but what really impressed me was the staff If you want stuffy correct attitude then maybe look elsewhere If you prefer genuinely friendly people get it booked

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Size of the rooms too small View theres no view at all you look at roof TV too small a screen Room service over priced   Two bottles of Evian per day Location par excellence Metro train connections

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The hotel location is excellent The staff are very friendly and responsive They were very kind to send fruits and macarrons to our room after the check in and complementary water every day

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Perfect location The staff was extremely well trained very helpful and friendly A particular thanks to Hugo and Florence who helped me to solve a little problem which was no fault of the hotel Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Still wondering nothing to say   Location of Hotel Paris attractions are near by this Location Easy to access the Metro Very friendly staffs they helped a lot Reasonable price to stay Looking forward to stay again for my upcoming travels to Paris Miss you guys

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Some wear and tear as an old and historic building could do with some renovations to rooms in the next few years  Great location friendly staff frequent room service with turn down So close to local attractions and metro to go further afield too

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The bed was too hard Would prefer more of a variety at breakfast Also better care with making sure there are no insects in the room   Loved the staff absolutely wonderful and extremely helpful Loved the location excellent and close to a metro station and all the other major touristic sites

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: the hotel is not quite completely renovated  Great location The issues with the room were quickly acted upon By Florence Our experience was greatly enhanced

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The meal in the restaurant was ordinary at best and way too expensive compared to other meals we had at cafes and restaurants close to the hotel   Access to all the venues we wanted to go to was great Service by the staff was terrific

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: We got married only two days ago and stayed there during our honeymoon I emailed twice about this but they completely ignored the enquiry I know bring newlyweds do not entitle us to special treatment but it would have been nice if they could acknowledge it in some dmall ways

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Well Our rooms air conditioning didn t work We called and maintenance came while we were out The fix was they left us a fan I m an understanding person and honestly after mentioning the air not working I didn t press further We just kept the windows open all night But when I m paying the nightly rates that this 5 star hotel charges I do expect air to work or to be moved to a room that does   The staff was incredible I cannot express this enough So overwhelmingly kind and and understanding of our complete lack of knowledge of the French language Almost all spoke fluent English and didn t make us feel bad for not knowing French Upon arrival we were presented with a complimentary happy anniversary desert and a hand written letter from the staff manager A lot of care went into the service and it showed

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Despite being described on the website as air conditioned the room was not air conditioned They did move me to a different room which although not air conditioned was cooler The d cor was shabby and the carpets were worn particularly on the upper levels On checking in they required me to sign a permission which allowed them to withhold 1 600 from my bank account for 4 nights the price of the room and an extra 300 on top of the bill in case I had anything extra This was most unexpected and not at all evident at the time of booking or on their website To top it all they charged me an extra 320 which I only discovered when I got home and checked my bank account It seems that they charged me for one of the nights that my friend had stayed She was charged for 3 nights instead of 4 nights They said it was because I used my credit card to book the rooms but no one had mentioned it to me I had also made it crystal clear at check in that my friend and I would each pay our separate bills They have promised to refund this amount to me but it was all very stressful and an absolute mess   The location is excellent

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Best place to stay center of the center of Paris we could travel by foot everywhere the staff are very helpfull and service oriented we highly recomend

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The only thing I did not like is that the building is an old one and you can hear the next room plumbing A few times I was sure I have water coming down on me from the floor above  The staff was great attentive kind the rooms are clean the bathroom is great the soap is Fragonard room service is fast the food is excellent location is great

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Hugo the wonderful manager explained that the hotel is about to undergo extensive renovations this should make the stay wonderful  My sister and I who travelled together are elderly but spry and healthy the staff looked after us so well we cannot be back soon enough to have some more of their wonderful caring service

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Eating there is expensive but many cafes in the area so not a problem  An amazing piece of history Fantastic location and great room It has heaps of character and good quality

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Air quality in the room was unfortunately not good Had to keep windows open a lot which of course brings in a bit of noise   Excellent staff very helpful and pleasant

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Older hotel which has been renovated however carpet could stand to be replaced   Staff was very friendly and accommodating Upon check in we were offered a temporary room until our room which the hotel upgraded was ready We had just flown in internationally and were very tired so it helped to be able to take a nap freshen up and store our luggage until our room was ready One block from the Louvre

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The most comfortable hotel we have ever stayed in Turn of the century Parisienne Style It is so charming You ll love it if you re a romantic Its not your typical flashy Hyatt look elsewhere if thats you re thing The staff were fantastic and nothing was a problem Got to love Friday jazz down in the bar 10 10 Hotel du Louvre

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Nothing stood out for us as bad service   The location of the hotel was ideal for us The staff were friendly and helpful They arranged a boat cruise for us on the Seine with lunch which was excellent

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Vacation was too short I wish we could have stayed longer   The welcone on arrival was wonderful Julie on reception went out of her way to ensure we had a great perfect room Every member of the team was pleasant happy and couldn t do enough to make sure you were ok I can t rate this hotel highly enough and it all stems from the amazing staff

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Our keycards for two rooms both decided to stop working at the same time My parents rang me to say their cards didn t work after having room service in my room I took my card with me and went over to their room and confirmed that their cards didn t let them in anymore I told them to wait in my room so I can ring them to see what s going on but when I tapped my card mine didn t work as well I was wearing shorts and my parents weren t appropriately dressed to go down to reception Luckily I had my mobile phone with me and the key cards have their hotel number to ring for help   Conceirge was attentive and everything that s supposed to work work well

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Bar prices were obscene 12 for a single cup of tea and 52 for a glass of entry level single malt Makes the saving on the room irrelevant   Excellent customer service nice hotel in a great location

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Would benefit a lot from a a renovation that I believe is needed badly to this beautiful hotel   Great location and very tentative employees to their guest

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The hotel was a little dated but they are going to be renovating soon I can t wait to see the updates   The staff was very friendly and helpful They upgraded our room made a restaurant reservation printed out our tickets for The Louvre and just generally made our stay amazing We chose to pay a little extra for a room with a view and it was well worth it Our window overlooked a plaza between Conseil d tat Le Louvre des Antiquaires and The Louvre

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: that we didn t stay longer   I travel extensively around the world for business and pleasure I was meeting my girlfriend in Paris for a late Valentine s day Birthday weekend I asked the hotel if they could get me half a dozen roses for the first night because we were celebrating Valentine s day then a week late and the next day her birthday They gave us a beautiful room with roses and the second night we got back to the room and there was a piece of cake that read Happy Birthday P S In terms of type of traveler we re between the young couple and mature couple range I love the staff THey were so accommodating This is my fourth time in Paris and the first time at the Hotel Du Louvre I will definitely stay at this hotel again

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The room was difficult to regulate temperature and the noise level due to location late at night was tough to get used to  The staff was very friendly and most of them spoke enough English to be very helpful with recommendations directions etc the room was small but comfortable

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The staff were fantastic They were so welcoming and definitely debunked the expectations of sassy French staff The hotel lobby was beautiful the room was quite spacious and comfortable and the staff did everything they could to make our stay memorable This hotel is a perfect location for a great trip to Paris We were only here for one night but were so central we could walk to see all of the sights

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: A kettle in the room would have been nice   The location is superb for sightseeing with high quality cafe s and bars nearby The hotel is also directly opposite the Easy Bus airport transfer stop

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: tap in the bathroom was leaking water during my stay although they tried to fix it once but it kept leaking water the day after   location interior design

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The hotel is in very poor condition not only that the floors are sloping which could be excused since the building is 150 years old But that carpets and bathroom tile are not maintained to a hygienic level is not acceptable   Very friendly staff

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Roof Room and on Louvre Museum street Side is Really Noisy Value for money it s just fine for a 4 stars level  Location Staff Bed Quality

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The hotel is slightly old and lacks facilities such as swimming pool and large entrance hall AC cannot be well adjusted   Location helpful staff excellent restaurant

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: We got in about 9 10 at night and usually would prefer to watch a movie to wind down so maybe more movie sports channels on the tv was a bit depressing watching the news as it was all about the Paris attacks and tension between Russia and Turkey English language I would read a book if I wanted subtitles  Very helpful and friendly reception and helpdesk They gave us directions and types of sightseeing things to do and best mode of transportation as well Always asked us if we needed help with anything at every single time we walked past reception Umbrellas are available for use free of charge as it does rain a fair bit in this time of year

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Considering the cost of the room not to have tea or coffee making facilities was a let down only a small one though   Location was great Metro station very close by Very helpful staff Excellent breakfast

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Expensive breakfast not worth it Arrived at 13hrs couldnt get the room untio 15hrs No late check out  Excellent location Very nice room big bathroom very clean

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The TV was too old world and did not work Neither did the films one could pay for The systems need updating   The hotel is wonderful old world and very beautiful It is perfectly located

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Showerhead constantly slipped minor problem  Customer care Brasserie breakfast Receptioon one evening and chat with Hugo Maisher good exercise and customer relations

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: for a five star hotel I thought the lift and hallway and our room s bathroom were all a bit tired   Location was fantastic and having the option of using the concierge or room service was nice though we didn t require either

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: On the other hand the hotel is very outdated and needs renovation urgently The rooms are old and cold The only reason the hotel gets a high score are the staff which really add a lot of value to the establishment The hotel is hardly worth its money even keeping in mind the location   The hotel is located quite nicely but without any on site hotel parking Quite hard to drive to as can easily be missed The staff of the hotel are a charm and very helpful We got our room upgraded and some very polite assistance Wifi is quite fast

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: I was expecting more The room is bit old   I was expecting a lot due to the price But the bed was huge and very comfortable the crib was good and the room was large Great location

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Woke up the first morning to find there was no hot water Problem with a broken pipe was not rectified until the afternoon which prevented everyone from showering bathing When we checked out we asked if there was any adjustment to our bill for this huge problem they offered the Hyatt passport for any future stays at one of their hotels Not great considering it is after all a five star establishment   Lovely comfortable hotel have stayed here before

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: We ran into a problem immediately with the bathroom The tub was old too high to get into and out of I am 5 tall and the bottom very slippery and shockingly no bar to hold onto anywhere We complained and the management attended to the problem immediately and installed a bar that was a huge improvement but not a real solution The tub is still too antiquated and inadequate as is the shower The carpeted floor was uneven and not as clean as it should have been The morning we left all the elevators in the hotel had broken down Evidently there are no service elevators   The staff was very attentive pleasant and and helpful Linens and towels were changed daily Two terry cloth robes were supplied both huge OK for my husband who is 6 but not for me As we had requested our room was silent and generally comfortable No breakfast included Good pricey restaurant

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Very noisy area with to many cars and scooters which starts their activity earlier in the morning This Can easily be heard in the room  Location close to Louvre

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: I don t like duvets I told Reception and they agreed I could have blankets if I make a request another time   Spacious room good bathroom etc Friendly staff and pleasant interior of building

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: old carpet and facilities High value for old property with smiley sheets and old furniture Noise at night air conditioner wasn t working well Old design and small room Bad shower tub  Location and view

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The executive room should prepare tea making pot in the first place However the room service staff did bring us the set after we asked for it   This hotel offer us tickets to the Louver mus e with a fast entry passage which did a great help avoiding waiting in line and save us more time and energy to enjoy the treasures of the museum

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Not a bad hotel but certainly not worth the 500 euro I paid a night Small room no amenities no view somewhat dreary limited television channels Generally mediocre   The location was fantastic

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Check in was challenging with poor communication about wait time until room was ready Concierge staff were not very friendly and seemed annoyed when asked for recommendations or questions   Spacious and clean rooms Excellent location Helpful doormen

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: I booked the Hyatt Queen Room for our aniversary weekend away I was offered an upgrade to an executive room which i accepted and paid extra for We were dissapointed with the room especially the view from the window the run down decoration and noisy plumbing The room also lacked a trouser press Iron and board english speaking news channel on tv coffee or tea making facilitiies free bottled water and a poorly stocked mini bar The rest of the hotel was ok with the exception that it had no tourist information around We never used the hotel for breakfast so no comment I have travelled all over the world and in my mind this is not worthy of a 5 star hotel more 3 at best Hotel is well over priced beware of the bar prices and water from the mini bar is 7 euro for 30cl Its a great location with local attractions at your toes   The location and Staff

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Condition of the hotel is poor it needs a full renovation Very poor sound insulation between rooms This hotel is nowhere near five star as advertised It is a low four star at best and HYATT should not allow their name to be used in such a way it greatly devalues the brand   Staff were friendly efficient and polite Excellent service

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Some of the rooms need an upgrade Some of the staff could be more helpful   They are getting better with service Mr Mohamed at the entrance is always the kindest most elegant and helpful Mme Florence at customer service was very kind too Having great key people at a Hotel makes the whole experience superior The beds are always incredibly comfortable and the internet is reliable The quality of the room service was better than ever The location is outstanding Overall the Hotel seems to keep getting better

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Rude staff incapable conscience they managed to lost our luggage which we left for safekeeping for 2 hours Finally they found it only because I had to go look for it since they left it untagged But it kept getting worse The people at the conscience probably couldn t understand English as There was a problem with the payment they agreed to get paid in cash and then wouldn t accept it The general manager apologized and promised to make it up to us by making our stay memorable Needless to say we neither saw or heard from him again It s like the first five star hotel I ve been to where they make the customer feel invisible and irrelevant Shame That s all I have to say

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Fabulous location the staff very friendly and helpful We had a view of the louvre museum from our room It was our first visit to Paris and thanks to the hotel we will return

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: We booked a courtyard side room as it was less expensive and we thought it would be quieter than the street side rooms What a mistake The courtyard houses the hotel s generators and was so noisy it was like sleeping next to a factory It was impossible to open the window and even with the window closed the noise was inescapable The hotel staff were unsympathetic and made no attempt to provide an alternative or to compensate us in any way Our room was undistinguished with poor quality toiletries no tea coffee making facilities room service tea is chaged at 10 euros and no complimentary water All in all over priced and certainly not good value for money I would have expected much more from a hotel that calls itself the oldest luxury hotel in Paris If you stay here avoid at all costs the courtyard side rooms unless you are hard of hearing   The hotel is a few minutes from the Louvre

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: pokey bedroom in need of renovation having to ask for toiletries and toilet paper to be replenished Thet were having a laugh with room service and breakfast prices poor value for money  The central location

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Dated Hotel in need of major refurbishment The cleanliness of the hotel also in some areas needed attention   Staff at the hotel were excellent Location was very central and within easy access to both the metro and many of the landmarks Service was good

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: The furniture in our room was a bit worn but this was just an aesthetic Everything worked properly   Location location location Staff provided excellent excellent service and new the area well The room was small but adequate with fab bathroom Id recommend future guests read up on the Baron Eugene Haussmann as the surrounding area remains an excellent example of his overall grand theme for Paris

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Fell ill during visit Hotel staff exstreamly helpful calling doctors and takinf care of my wife Extended our stay with an extreamly generous discount A top notch hotel

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: For a 5 hotel it would have been nice to have a complimentary bottle of water for each night stayed rather than the one provided at start of the stay The hotel would also benefit from having spa beauty facilities to help with the aches and pains from all the walking undertaken whilst taking in the sights I was also slightly surprised by the sharp increase in the bar tariff from the terrace bar to the bar lounge   The location of this hotel is fantastic however overall it lacked the attention to detail you would expect for a 5 rating The staff especially the concierge were extremely helpful however on occasion we felt rushed to finish our drinks snacks by some staff at the terrace bar despite it not being overly busy The free wifi was a welcome feature

Hotel_Name: Hotel du Louvre in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
Full_Review: Standard room was a bit small and not so clean So it is a bit expensive for the standard room  Staff were great and very friendly Also they provided a wheelchair for my father for all his stay Corner Suit was so big and nice

It is certainly not a five star hotel The menu at the restaurant was poor the food mediocre Traces left by the previous eaters on the table Gin hardly noticeable in gin and tonic cocktail At breakfast nearly impossible to get your order right Bathrobes in the rooms have to be changed these ones have been in use for not less than 5 7 years

The rooms are very modern though lack amenities eg coffee machine kettle and other small things you get in other hotels The hotel makes you pay steep prices for those add ons We didn t bring toothbrush etc as they come standard in order hotels and are readily available in the rooms Here we had to call and only got 1 for the two of us which was not what you would expect from such hotel The reception is slow and don t seem focused problem solving They made us wait for 2 hours at check in even when checking in after 2pm which was as per the booking we made and their T C s   Location was really good very central and close to access the main landmarks Very nice concierge staff
The hotel has very little in the way of facilities A small lobby small bar restaurant Like a small block of apartments really  Staff were great though and location good
Excellent staff Jenna on the desk in particular definitely deserves some recognition for the outstanding service my partner and I received when we arrived on Saturday
The food room ambience of the hotel and the staff were of the highest order I highly recommend the hotel to others and would definitely stay when in Paris next

There s no real common area such as a lobby area with couches The shower is basically facing the room so if you re traveling with someone you don t want to shower with it becomes a bit tricky   The hotel staff was very friendly and the concierge very helpful with reservations recommendations etc The location is great and the rooms cozy and confortable

1 Staff was rude When we arrived W Hotel The bell boy just stood there and did not came and help us with our luggage even we called for it 2 Do not go for the breakfast because there is nothing much to eat we paid 38 euro per person You can eat a good meal at other restaurants 3 Cleaner Maid was rude They knocked on our door for cleaning And when I opened the door she scolded me for not putting the do not disturb sign I was in shocked Is this the service you give us With the price I paid Overall W Hotels in Europe are just not worth staying I ve stayed in most of Asia s W Hotel and their service are beyond excellent   Opera House view

But the design for the detail is so bad The breakfast is so bad only few choice can select Even worse than other 3 stars hotel Not worth to its price The design of hydrant tap is so bad hard to find a comfortable temperature The air conditioning is automatically When we came in it s warm But when we want to sleep it s start to make cool wind And u can not choose it The staff came after I call them twice and can do nothing We are so tired so we turn it off to sleep Fortunately it s not that cold But the air conditioning is rubbish   its a good hotel due to its price Nice staff

The rooms were tired Visible signs of wear and tear When you check into a 5 star hotel you don t want any reminders of previous guests The shower hinges were rusty one fell off when I opened the door scratches and marks all over the sink and bathroom drawers and the carpet was pretty scuffed A big problem being on the first floor was the rumble of the train every three minutes Very loud Also the wifi was beyond terrible and the movies were poor resolution Not what I would expect when paying 11 for one film   The staff were very helpful and eager to please We arrived at 4am and there was someone to immediately check us in park our car and take our bags up to our room after upgrading us to a marvellous suite Big room comfy bed ample storage space and the docking charging station for any mobile device was a nice touch Great location The cafe Cullier down at Galleries Lafayete was the best I ve ever had in France The shower products bliss were large and amazing Great surprise

Everything from the interior design of the amazing Marvellous suite to the cleanliness and constant friendliness of the staff both reception and house keeping The location is a walking distance away from all the major tourist attractions
no in house restaurant  location staff
Lighting in room confusing   Bed comfy especially for my daughter after running marathon Location central to all the sights and metro
Pre authorisation on debit card that has not been removed as yet although I checked out yesterday   The bed was very cosy
I had an high expectation with the breakfast but it wasn t that good
Rooms were a bit tatty and worn hotel bar closed early   Good location
would be better if there is DND light at door rather than a sign which is removable   Excellent concierge service

location and friendliness of the staff

Nothing But if you want to be in the heart of the city it might not be for you however its only a ten minute taxi   The property was perfect for a relaxing getaway away from the busy city Very comfortable and beautiful facilities especially the bath spa and pool
The view wasn t great in my room and the room service was very limited The breakfast in extremely overpriced  The hotel pool and grounds are amazing

the location is a bit far from the action as for someone who wants to go around the city then it s a bit far except if you book a city tour buss ticket as it passes by next to the hotel  The view is magnificent from upper floors I didn t leave my room balcony for more than an hour for relaxing its a perfect choice

We had a fantastic stay at Miramar I would not say it is a five star hotel but definitely a good four star Things were getting a bit tired at the edges and there seemed to be a lack of attention to detail That said the pool and the pool bar was fabulous despite closing super early

Location would not suit everybody It is a bit out of the city but taxis are plentiful and only take about 10 minutes to most sites   Staff were excellent room was fantastic with great views over the city and sea Valet parking Breakfast was plentiful and fresh

You basically have to take a taxi wherever you want to go in the city otherwise you re walking up down a pretty steep hill Restaurant is very overpriced  Beautiful clean and well designed hotel It has a great view of Barcelona below especially if you go for a walk run up and around the hill it s on We stayed here on our last night in Spain because the location made it super easy to get to the airport 15 mins

The location and having to wait up to an hour for a cab to go out at night Bar by the pool was always closed as were the toilets Not enough seating you the pool if the hotel was busy in high season Room 422 shower door hits the shower head and so can only half open the door The glass WC door does not close properly as the hinges are too tight so no privacy The cushions for the outside seats were missing and never replaced even though we asked The nearby cable car which takes you to the beach is just one car in each direction meaning the queues were very long and VERY slow took us 45 minutes not in high season Hotel should have complimentary shuttle service to and from the hotel in the evening A local bar closes at 8pm   The staff were very helpful kind and considerate Breakfast was good Room 422 was good and clean but expensive but the tiny window 60x60cm facing the sea was ridiculous

Very noisy band playing close by until 4 am one day resulting in no sleep Too many superfluous lights in bedroom that could not be turned off Smelly drainage in bathroom Failure of wake up call possibly because telephone was unplugged the alternative knock on the door was an hour late Occasional missed supplies for bathroom and tea coffee making   Very helpful concierge services Great view from balcony Very clean

A bit of a walk to the nearest train station Not as central as some other hotels   Beautiful room with excellent facilities Huge bed and super comfortable We arrived early 9am and they had a room ready for us which was really nice of them Service staff were warm and welcoming Great views from the hotel

Some of the soft furnishings are tired   The staff were exceptionally friendly everywhere in the hotel The hotel is tired in places but the location quality of food and friendliness make up for it It s only a short taxi ride from town centre and away from the noisy crowds The bed is very comfortable

Two things arriving at the room and finding some sort of cereals vomit looking like thing dropping down my window They did come and cleaned it within less than 10 min though the fountain outside our window which made noise all night I called asking if they could turn it off but they didn t manage to do it basically keeping me awake all night There s also a club next door so if you re more or less sensitive to noise ask for a quiet room on the other end of the hotel   The overall facilities are amazingly comfortable super for relaxing Away from the whole hustle and bustle of the city center Also 15 min taxi trip to the airport when you have to fly at 6h30am it s great

They gave me a room that did not look anything like in the pictures of my premium room I said this to receptionist and she told me there are no other rooms available So I called booking com they sorted this out and I got a better room Still the magical feeling about having a good holiday mood was gone Would never recommend to anyone until they train their staff W is much better option and almost same price   They have their own mountain with gardens which is impressive just like the city view
Steep walk down to the town but we like walking so no problem for us   The hotel and its staff were impeccable So friendly and perfect you will not be disappointed staying here

Would have been good if they have coffee making facilities but i asked and they gladly accommodate my request   The location is perfect close to the city centre It is located up on the hill overlooking barcelona city and the pier also surrounded by beautiful park The room is big and nice The bathroom amenities exceed my expectation The staffs are really helpful

Unable to reduce Air Conditioning below 20 Celsius No CD player in room and very limited english speaking TV channels  Breakfast variety was extremely good Staff were always excellent Very quiet although Seat were having a conference downstairs We were upgraded on arrival to a premium Double with large terrace balcony Wow View
Location very close to City Centre but owing to its situation on top of Montjuic access to the city was difficult   Staff and panoramic views Double edged sword re views see what didn t like
i didnt like that the room wasnt quite fair compared to the pictures in booking especially bathroom eventhough really comfortable room   the swimming pool
Was nearly hit In the room by parts of the ceiling Please be aware if you stay with children as these parts are heavy   The design of the hotel is perfect

Location is a bit far from city center 10 12 euro by taxi however excellent for people looking for nice view of the city and quite neighborhoods room service prices are higher than average   friendly reception staff spacious room In general excellent hotel

The bed is very soft and used the rooms need to be reworked but you forget about everything looking out of the window   If you ever visit Barcelona book this Hotel with a room to the Harbor side no matter what you will be excited I cannot imagine to stay anywhere else and would move my travel schedule if there would not be an available room Thanks to all staff members especially to Martin the recommondations he gave us were great

the sheet was not very clean The location is not so good need around 15 20 minutes to walk down to the metro  best view to look the full view of Barcelona and also the harbour the room is comfortable the staff was nice friendly helpful it is quiet best for holiday resort

There was a wedding in the gardens directly behind my room I stayed at the hotel for a good rest but was kept up by the after party till around 1am I called reception 3 times Stayed here 3 4 times and never had any issues but when you spend a lot on 2 nights you expect a good nights sleep at least

The hotel is just starting to show its age a little bit though everything worked fine Drivers especially Tesla drivers be very careful entering the garage there s a nasty ramp which hit our battery raise your air suspension   The location of the hotel is pretty spectacular and the facilities are very good including 2 Tesla chargers one in the garage and one outside We particularly liked the very stylish bar area with very comfortable chairs and books The bed was really comfortable

The spa was very nice and treatments were perfectly standard was just hopinging for more of a wow experience   Loved the room with a terrace Loved the location felt like we were staying in a park overlooking the city

There were some problems with the comming water and shower temperature and one time water stopped Repairmen come immediately what we appreciated As well count on it that it is a bit far away to centre from hotel by walk   The hotel staff was very helpful Room has great terrace with nice view Bed is really large and comfortable

A little disappointed in the room Poorly laid out Poor lighting especially in the bathroom Bed linen could be improved and the terrace lacked privacy and protection from the wind   Fantastic view Excellent Restaurant and bar

I would have preferred that the bed in my room was one double bed and not the two joined types   The staff were excellent They are responsive and offer assistance beyond what they are asked for The bathrooms are wonderful The breakfast too was great
General maintenance of doors walls etc to be improved Taxy availability at nigth and raining days very poor   Location top class Quality of food at breakfast really high level

Breakfast is just ridiculously expensive We only want a coffee and croissant but this was not available Their restaurant at night served lovely food with great staff BUT if you don t like cats asking for food don t eat here This is supposed to be an up market hotel and restaurant but this really let the place down No international press either   Staff were welcoming and friendly The views from our room were excellent and the restaurant food good Bedroom was large and comfortable and clean The hotel is isolated There are only a couple of other restaurants nearby and both were expensive Good for an overnight but a longer stay would be restrictive

The mattress wasn t to comfortable it took a few nights to get used to it I needed to lean my body to use the magnifying mirror in the bathroom because it was to close to the wall   The location was great the views were beautiful The Hotel entrance has a nice water fountain and we liked the lilies in all the rooms around the reception The housekeeping cleaned the room until late We always find all the staff very friendly polite and helpful

Horrible staff They simply ly to you and do not give the booked room suite with a bath becomes normal room without a bath At the terrace it feels like you have to beg for something to drink or eat and horrible loud music until late every night The only exception is the personel at the pool and the spa they are great This was our second time en we will never come back there

The worst part was that money was stolen from my room the second day of my stay I only exchange a few hundred euros and only those got stolen I didnt put my wallet in the safe and that was the excuse for not recognizing the fact that my money was gone I didnt thought that in a expensive place like this I had to take extreme actions to secure my belongings The main security guy Diego was rude and deny the fact that an event like that could happen there but there is always a first time The manager was a little more understanding however they didnt take any responsibility Barcelona is city that you can easily get pickpocketed in the metro in the plazas with lots of tourists in fact one morning i woke up and from my room at Miramar Ive heard lots of commission in the plaza down below some people were running and screaming calling the police The food in the restaurant took more than 40 minutes to arrive and it was only a couple of salads and a plate of nachos   Beautiful location nice staff

Room Service Food Menue was not that good unfortunately We got little options in it and no PIZZA which is our main meal in Non Muslim Country and the Pasta was not well cooked Still the great staff makes you accept that   Outstanding customer service and guests needs followup by all hotel employees specially the below guys should have special thanks with regards Jonathan Front Desk S Visor Alejandro Front Desk Marcello Bellboy Louis Trainee Since they were very cooperative and doing well not only with us we saw them dealing with all guests Shortly The hotel knew how to choose their employees perfecrly It was our 1st visit to them but sure it wont be the last one we really enjoyed our stay Swimming pool area was great in all areas Thanks alot guys

Sorry Miramar but it has to be repeated and it s what the other reviewers keep mentioning the pool area and lack of sunbeds Please listen to your reviewers there is a grassy area there begging for some decking and sunbeds which would be far more comfy for the guests than having to lie on towels on the grass where there were lots of wasps lurking That was my only minus in an otherwise flawless report   I choose our hotel properties based on other reviews hotel websites pictures and I guess a bit of intuition It is always a pleasure to find that the intensive research pays off and Hotel Miramar is no exception It delivers all it promises and the staff are a credit particularly the very hardworking pool bar and restaurant staff who diligently look after you fetching and carrying in the baking heat whilst always smiling The bedrooms are exceptional and without doubt possibly the best for all round comfort and location the views from our balcony of practically everywhere including port beach sea were simply stunning Lovely Molton Brown toiletries and the comfiest bed and pillows Awesome location property and staff Oh and the breakfasts Pricy at 28 euro per person there were 6 of us but it was delicious and beautifully presented and provided by yet another set of amazing staff Just a tip if you are more than a party or family of 4 it is going to be difficult hailing a roadside cab to accommodate extra people so better to give reception some due notice if you need transport

Just the breakfast it didn t have any taste and not a lot of options  Me and fianc loved the pool and the bartenders there So relaxing and the pool has a nice view of the sea side and some of the city it was so chilled and amazing to relax in the pool Loved it We will return for sure

Peaceful atmosphere with great views from the hotel The staff were excellent on reception and in the hotel Staff around the pool bar were overworked but did very well to meet our needs We had massages in the spa and all staff in the spa were very good The massages were fantastic A great experience and we will be back

Broken shower which took all day to fix despite multiple calls request for ice took a trip down to reception after 4 calls to room service and already used condiments with our room service we had to request more as all were nearly empty took away some of the sparkle   Amazing views over Barcelona you cannot beat them from the hotels position on the hill top Super friendly people Beautiful hotel

Everything  Fantastic hotel I dont say this lightly as I have travelled a bit but one of the best hotel and locations I have ever stayed All staff were superb we will be back Great location for nice break Danny Lillington

Unfortunately they don t seem to have enough sun beds and their new umbrellas are useless as they are too light in any wind My friend got hit by a falling one on the arm Staff are apologetic but don t seem too concerned   Bed was extremely comfy Great location above Barcelona so if you want to relax rather than be a complete tourist then it s a perfect location

The poolside bar food could have been a little better for the beautiful quality of the hotel and the three staff seemed a little overwhelmed with a full guest load in the sunshine  Reception Staff were lovely rooms the spa and the hotel itself loaction incredible and it felt like you had the space of being in the country with gardens grass and endless views of the port and city of Barcelona Drinks On the terrace at sunset the room service rigatoni bolognese was one of the best ive tasted

Breakfast is really nothing special for the price The decoration of the rooms is ok but could be better kind of cold Level of service is really standard for a 5   Located is a little remoted but the view is outstanding make sure to get rooms with sea view or really not worth the location Rooms have a really nice size

Pre paid almost 500 a night and then realized when I got there the rate had gone down over 100 a day Also concierge was helpful in booking specific tickets but didn t advise that we might want to prebook other exhibits which would have been helpful   Nice hotel but a bit out of the way Would have been a good couples hotel Very nice view from the balcony

No metro stop at this location since it is on Montjuic Rooms are a little pricey  Great views of the whole port from room balcony nearly all rooms have balcony Nearby attractions on Montjuic including Castle which also had great views Wide variety of food at breakfast for 20 a day Very quiet peacefull facility 20 minute walk to Las Ramblas Awesome room service try the Iberian Ham or croquettes Bring a Intl power adapter for U S plugs

Being mugged in the Barcelona Olymipic Park So a strange women walked up to my partner and asked us to fill in a petition to get disabled access to go up the stairs Before I knew it a man came out of no where and asked me to do the same Then as we were walking away the pair came with their piece of paper and started banging it saying a donation X as I went to get the loose change out of my wallet the man started banging even hard on the paper and what was very clever the woman must have taken all of my cash because when I got back to my hotel my wallet was empty So be careful do not get caught out Another review point that I worried about was the fact that there was a shooting range right next door If you have a room around the back and side I imagine that it would have been loud but if you pay to stay at the front it has hardly noticeable   The hotels situated up on Mount Juce and over looks the harbour We had paid the extra for a suite that was at the front of the hotel with a gorgeous balcony 519 I had read lots of reviews about paying the extra for the suite and I can honestly say it was worth it The staff were so helpful I had a really bad headache in the middle of the night and with no paracetamol the porter had organised a taxi to go to the local pharmacy and brought me paracetamol within 20mins The smellies in the room were loccitaine and the there was a little spa shop where you could buy goods The bar food room service and restaurant were all yummy I would go back and recommend this hotel to anyone The open top bus trip stop is right out front A taxi down into the Center was only 10 12 euros and the walk is not too bad down the hill

We asked for a late checkout on a Monday and we were told the hotel was fully booked and they needed all the rooms However we stayed at the hotel until 3pm and the hotel didn t seem full at all We had the feeling the answer was quite mechanical The lady who did our check in seemed to be totally uninterested in what we had to say Some of the personnel at the restaurant was very attentive though Very limited amount of amenities in the bathroom Having a L Occitane spa I would have expected to have some bath salts or bath oil at the bath Just one of each in the shower The furniture in the room was in need of touch ups Most of the big double sunbeds at the pool had a reserved sign but nobody was around Music was too loud and commercial for the morning Pool service only spoke English and not very friendly Some personnel should be told to smile   Glass of very good cava on arrival Luggage taken to the room while having a drink Huge bed good linen Terrace with views of the park and the port of Barcelona Good selection of food at breakfast and good service Good service at dinner time too The pool area was nice but lacking shade Bottle of water courtesy of the hotel with nice chocolates

The shower could have been cleaner under the concrete slabs They needed more beds by the pool One of the pool bar staff maybe needed more training  Generally very attentive and helpful staff who went out of their way to give information and help Comfortable room
The young blonde lady working a the pool bar could have been more professional by not outwardly showing her stress and annoyance   The bed was very comfortable

Expensive area for food and drinks Few restaurants in immediate vicinity Renovation in bar area meant bar closed early and we were not made aware of this beforehand Noise from shooting range at back of hotel and hotel should make customers aware this is what the noise is   Massive beautiful room with large patio Very attentive staff Lots of choice for breakfast even dim sums Location perfect for us as we were going to a concert in the Olympic stadium Also excellent location for cable car to Barceloneta Scenic cafe bar overlooking port area Pleasant downhill walk to city Beautiful pool area

Service both for room service and restaurant was very slow but fortunately we were not in a rush   Bed was super comfy and room well appointed I asked to borrow a kettle as none was provided so that I could have tea in the room Great location with fantastic views room 605 has enormous balcony with views of port and city Food at breakfast and dinner was delicious

Entrance area of the hotel is very industrial looking and don t fit with the rest of the hotel The food in the restaurant is great but very expensive They could do with a bit more choice on the bar menu   Pool area is great

Remote location meant some effort in getting to and from the nighttime action Some aspects of the hotel rooms are a little tired and almost threadbare   Staff were great Very attentive polite and helpful Remote location meant quiet and privacy

2 corporate bookings a wedding and a prom meant two sleepless nights we would have expected to be told beforehand especially as these events went on until 3 30am   Staff were excellent and having stayed before we know they are consistent

Sauna not on Builders tiling in the indoor pool Ants in our room dealt with Price of accommodation food drinks extortionate   View from the huge balcony was second to none Room 605 Comfy Bed and lovely room Staff dealt well with a problem we encountered Good Breakfast Clean

The toilet door was very noisy which isn t good when you have a 5 month old Could do with a pillow selection   The bath was excellent The gardens beautiful The views of barcelona are unbelievable but you are ontop of a mountain

The room was not what I expected when I booked The image on the Booking com website was misleading and I ended up in a small room I booked it because it specified it was spacious but when checking in the hotel said the price was linked to the view I was disappointed and as the hotel was full I couldn t be moved   Good location peaceful nice atmosphere Really lovely staff who couldn t be more helpful
The water in the swimming pool was dirty   the room was nice and quiet The view on the mountain was amazing you can have a panorama of the Barcelona harbor

The spa needs a brush up Atmosphere not very friendly and old fashioned Missed a room to chill   Location is fantastic We had a nice and quiet room with view on the harbor and the city Lounge bar and restaurant are excellent

Spa and pool is tired and needs a refit Without a car it may feel a little remote but is only a 10min drive to pretty much everywhere   Beautiful suite with 270 degree view over Barcelona Huge private terrace with sun loungers and chairs to relax Large room with large sliding doors windows facing the sea Friendly hotel staff Excellent quality breakfast with a lovely terrace overlooking the park at Montjuic Good 5 course degustation dinner as well Also enjoyed the Nespresso machine in the room and at breakfast A sanctuary of peace and quiet with the energy and diversity of Barcelona on the door step

This is 5 stars hotel so expectations are adequate to this Unfortunately the hotel did not meet them The list of shortcomings could be very long but I ll mention the most important Untrained staff not speaking English and not capable to answer any questions Tragic service restaurant during breakfast or lunch lack of products on breakfast but they pull your plate to finish faster Room cleaning lasts forever we were leaving about 12 and coming back at 17 to untidy room After leaving for pool outside the door shuts automatically you can not return unless passing the restaurant In conclusion hotel in need of renewal and with incompetent service which pretends 5 stars Curiosity was to block double money on my card which I failed so far to recover Definitely avoid this place   localization bar

Was very happy   Great location great views amazing room with bath situated in room friendly staff super comfortable beds and nice breakfast Lucky to get a special price on booking com and made a great 3 days in barcelona The staff were even able to assist with checking in early and also able to help book tours and advise for dinner spots etc Highly recommend

Hotel lounge background music   The staff were always very professional helpful and friendly The location is great close to the city centre but peace and calm at the end of the day The views are superb

The breakfast included was fantastic and hugely helpful loooooooved my room with a super comfy bed and gorgeous view with a terrace overlooking the port Beautiful decor and loved the pool Easy access to taxis as well Great staff that were extremely helpful

Having to leave the position of the hotel is on a hill top with great views stunning this could be an issue for less mobile people however if you love the views you can t have it all not an issue for us we loved it  Outstanding service from the moment we arrived until we left premium room definitely worth the plump do breakfast as well as its very tasty

Can t say I had anything to complain about  Personal touch all staff are so freindly We had dinner in the hotel which we found to be outstanding if you are looking at the booking and think I won t bother with breakfast DONT pay that small fee and enjoy so good
They counted me the item from the minibar which I did not use but I noticed after arrival home   Very nice wiew from the executive room upstairs nice breakfast

Staf staff staff is very rude specially managers such Xavi the manager when I asked him I check in hotel midnight and my flight is departing at 18 00 next day I request late check out and he advice cannot extend and very disappointing and he is not up the the level of 5 start Hotel manager   Room is very comfortable and clean and the size of the room so big

It is out of the main town very hard to access steep steps we counted 280 steps very dusty and impossible with luggage thank god we didn t bring the kids If you come for the city and want to be eating out and exploring then this is a little too off the beaten track for my liking Also the hotel is a 5 but didn t refresh towels or water toiletry s in the rooms which I would expect at any hotel especially one of this standing   A lovely setting and a very nice hotel on first glance Spa is in need of a good lick of paint walls peeling shabby locker rooms the staff in the spa very good but just looked tired Hotel View amazing originally placed in the gardens asked for a sea view we got a city sea view which was lovely Food and drinks very expensive in comparison to the city itself but within 5 prices so not too bad

The climb up to the hotel is quite steep but we chose to do it There are plentiful taxis if you re not up to it Great views of the city   Fabulous hotel and staff We were offered an upgrade of room at a reasonable price but stuck with the Luxe room Room was great couldn t fault it Staff were helpful and very friendly

We used the lounge area quite a lot during our stay Very comfortable The Hotel is located away from the hustle and bustle of La Rambla but conveniently located in the park where there is lots to explore and discover Great views over Barcelona

I stayed at the hotel 3 nights and I am very pleased with my choice of the hotel The hotel staff was utmost helpful professional yet not intrusive Every little request I made was attended to immediately I was hesitating whether to order breakfast or not because it is on the expensive side but I am glad that I chose to have breakfast at the hotel what you get is definitely worth the money you pay for it and it includes good quality traditional Spanish food
The rooms are a little bit old Needs to be renovated   Very friendly Staff Super Service I can highly recommend the restaurant I will come back again Dutch service crew did an amazing job
The breakfast is bad Not equivalent to such cost of room breakfast Very little shower gel in the room only 1 small bottle   Location atmosphere and the balcony

Perfect location and a great view over the city Modern furniture and comfortable beds Nice restaurant and spa center Staff kind and helpful Special thanks to Manuel from the Reception desk a man with a personality
you need taxi to go to the center but not worth to be angry about if you feel home in an quiet charming place  Just a great view over the city and quiet stay on the hill surrounded by an amazing park

The room next door to me was being renovated which meant I woke up to builders on my balcony one morning The reception were great and got them to stop right away There was also drilling next door on my last day I understand hotels have to keep up with maintenance but it was a little disappointing   The view was amazing the bed massive and comfy The shower was like being in a monsoon in a good way The indoor pool was lovely and warm and everywhere was clean and well looked after

I booked a premium room and expected to have a bathtub in the middle of the room just like in the picture but we just got a normal room with a good view I called the reception about this and they told me that a premium room means a room at the front of the hotel unlike what was promised when I booked the room They promised to give us another premium room the next morning There was a huge difference between the two rooms which I don t think is fair for customers who both book a premium room The service was helpful but i wish the whole misunderstanding could have been prefented in the first place   I liked the view and the location

There s a shooting club at the back of the hotel and the noise can be heard but it s not too loud May get annoying if you have a room at the back and wish to spend time on your balcony   The staff were so friendly and inviting The spa facilities were lovely and the rooms extremely clean The breakfast was extensive and the chef will cook specific items to order if they are not generally available
Check in at 3pm but that s just my personal dislike I understand most places over the weekends are booked up and don t have availability for early check in   Very friendly and accommodating staff

The only downside was a constant background engine rumble from the Port This was NOT a problem in the room but was a bit annoying on the balcony  Beautiful setting overlooking port Very comfy room and nice breakfast Easy access to reasonably priced terrace bar serving Sandwiches to Pizza and Pasta Superb Wifi if you need to keep in touch
Be aware of sport shooting gallery before your windows Shoot every 15 sec all day long from 8 am non comparable impression  75 discount in offseason made price smart
Great 5 star hotel one of the best in Barcelona Is out of the way great views and isolated from English tourist noise but a 5 minute walk to La Rambla

The garden view room is extremely noisy in the morning afternoon times due to the close proximity of the shooting field You would hear every single bullet from different weapons like if it was next to your room   Friendly staff at the reception polite smiles everywhere beautiful views garden see spacious rooms

The room we booked was not available for the first night The hotel warned us 2 hours before our plane took off This is not acceptable for such an hotel They couldn t arrange for another room in the same hotel even for a lower standard one They finally find a room in another hotel When we arrived at the hotel the front desk people seem to be unaware of our situation They finally upgraded our room where restroom had no door and offered the breakfast for the morning after Again the people in the breakfast room was not aware that we ve been offered the breakfast What a surprising lack of communication for such an hotel   The room was comfortable except the restroom had no door
